{{Relic Infobox|Happy Flower???|2}}{{Keyword Infobox|Energy|2}}
{{R|Happy Flower???||2}} is an {{QueryLink|Relics|rarity:Event|Event|2}} {{2|Relics|Relic}} from the [[Slay the Spire 2:Merchant???|Merchant???]]. It is a weaker version of {{R|Happy Flower||2}}. Every fifth turn, it provides the player with one extra {{Icon|CE|2}}. The counter for this effect remains between combat encounters.

== Sources ==
Can be bought from the [[Slay the Spire 2:Merchant???|Merchant???]]. Also can be obtained upon defeating the [[Slay the Spire 2:Merchant???|Merchant???]] in combat.
